name: team-skills
description: Shared Codex skills for team development workflows and conventions.

interface.shortDescription: Shared team workflows and Codex skills.
interface.longDescription: Team Skills packages the reusable Codex skills that the team uses for development workflows, delivery conventions, and repository-specific operating procedures.
